Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We are given two logs Log A primary timeline and Log B richer attributes We need to merge them into a single integrated event log

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Parse both logs into structured data Align events based on order_id and timestamp proximity tolerance less than 2 seconds Also consider event naming variations

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For each event in Log A find the best match in Log B same order_id timestamp difference less than 2 seconds and event name similarity Since there is only one order Order1234 we can match by timestamp and event semantics

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Merge matched events combine attributes Choose a primary timestamp maybe from Log A as primary timeline but we can also include both Well include both timestamps for transparency

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For unmatched events in either log include them as separate events with origin indicated Sort final merged events chronologically by chosen primary timestamp for example Log A timestamp if available else Log B timestamp

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Log A Order Received at 100000 vs Log B OrderReceived at 095958 difference 2 seconds event names correspond so merge

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Log A Order Validated at 100130 vs Log B OrderValidation at 100129 difference 1 second Match

Name: Counterfactual Reasoning - IND
Text: Log A Payment Processed at 100200 vs Log B PaymentCheck at 100205 difference 5 seconds Thats greater than 2 seconds Could they be the same event

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: They are the only payment related events and the names are clearly related The note says Payment gateway delay 5 seconds is small so we should match them with a note about timestamp discrepancy

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Log A Item Shipped at 100500 vs Log B Shipping at 100502 difference 2 seconds We will match

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Log A Item Delivered at 102000 has no corresponding event in Log B Log B has Quality Check at 100300 which has no match in Log A So these are unmatched events

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Thus we have matched pairs Order Received and OrderReceived Order Validated and OrderValidation Payment Processed and PaymentCheck Item Shipped and Shipping Unmatched Log A Item Delivered Unmatched Log B Quality Check

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We will sort by primary timestamp Log A timestamp for matched events Log B timestamp for Log B only events Log A timestamp for Log A only events Final chronological order Order Received Order Validated Payment Processed Quality Check Item Shipped Item Delivered
